**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Nanjing Yiju Electromechanical Equipment Co., Ltd. serves as an archetypal "village-run workshop concurrently operating as a hardware and building materials resale point." The system has forcefully dispelled any preconceived illusion of it being an Apple Inc.-level multinational giant. Official classification systems categorize it as "Manufacture of Electrical Machinery and Apparatus." However, physical-layer scrutiny has revealed its true nature: the entity claims a registered capital of 5 million [RMB], with only 650,000 [RMB] actually paid-in, and for 2024, its social security enrollment stands at a meager "2 individuals." Most indicative is its registered address—9-1 Yunxu Road, Qingshan Community, Chunhua Sub-district, Jiangning District, Nanjing City. This represents a typical suburban village or township street address. With two employees situated in a village setting, yet claiming to "manufacture metalworking machinery" and "manufacture casting machinery," this undoubtedly constitutes further evidence of "workshop-level hyperbole." Considering the latter half of its business scope (sales of building decoration materials, hardware products, fire-fighting equipment, and doors/windows), the definitive conclusion is drawn: this is fundamentally not a major machinery manufacturing plant, but rather a "hardware and building materials retail outlet concurrently operating as a micro-scale mechanical processing workshop" located in a suburban township. The proprietor (Zhang Wei), accompanied by a single worker, likely operates a small lathe in the rear of the premises for rudimentary hardware processing or door/window cutting, while the front storefront is utilized for reselling various coating equipment, fire-fighting equipment, and construction materials.
